title: Assistant Store Manager - Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions!
